name: coding_linteral
description: Local coding-practice trainer with LLM-generated lessons and deterministic checks.

scripts.runtime:workspace: docker compose -f docker-compose.workspace.yml up code-server openhands
scripts.runtime:project: test -n "$CODELEARN_PROJECT_ID" && CODELEARN_WORKSPACE_MOUNT="${CODELEARN_WORKSPACE_ROOT:-./workspace}/$CODELEARN_PROJECT_ID" CODELEARN_WORKSPACE_CONTAINER_PATH="/workspaces/$CODELEARN_PROJECT_ID" docker compose -f docker-compose.workspace.yml up code-server openhands
scripts.runtime:memory: docker compose -f docker-compose.workspace.yml up falkordb graph-memory
scripts.runtime:all: docker compose -f docker-compose.workspace.yml up code-server openhands falkordb graph-memory
scripts.test: node tests/self-check.mjs && node tests/persistence-api-check.mjs && python3 tests/memory-service-check.py
